name: Kotlety Pozharskie<ground Chicken Cutlets>
recipeIngredient: 10 tbsp Unsalted butter in small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 5 bread slices in a bowl and pour milk over them. Let soak for 15 minutes.
2. Squeeze the soaked bread dry, taking care not to tear it.
3. Grind the chicken until fine, then combine with the bread slices.
4. Gradually beat in the softened butter, salt, and pepper into the mixture until smooth.
5. Form the mixture into 6 patties.
6. Roll each patty in bread crumbs, coating completely.
7. Clarify 10 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over low heat.
8. Remove from heat and let sit for 3 minutes to allow whey to settle out.
9. Spoon off the clear butter, discard the whey, and return 6 tablespoons of butter to the skillet.
10. Place patties on the hot skillet and fry over medium-high heat until done, about 5-6 minutes per side.
11. Serve immediately, pouring remaining butter over the patties. Good with a dollop of plain yogurt or sour cream on each patty.
